name: pr-bench
description: HiTorro PR Bench - Repository management, tagging, AI descriptions, and benchmarking

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: List all registered repositories with optional filters

search.description: Search across name, description, tags, language

hasNotes.description: Filter repos with (true) or without (false) descriptions

tools.name: get_repo_status
tools.description: Compare local state vs live GitHub state for a repo (description, tags)

tools.name: add_tag
tools.description: Add a git tag to a repository (pushes to GitHub immediately)

tools.name: remove_tag
tools.description: Remove a git tag from a repository (deletes from GitHub)

tools.name: set_description
tools.description: Set description for a repository (pushes to GitHub, max 350 chars)

tools.name: generate_description
tools.description: Use Ollama to generate a description by scanning the repo's README, file tree, commits, and manifest

tools.name: repo_stats
tools.description: Get faceted stats: counts by owner, language, tag, fork status, description coverage

tools.name: sync_to_github
tools.description: Force-push local description and tags to GitHub for a repo

tools.name: browse_github
tools.description: List all GitHub repos visible to the authenticated user's token

tools.name: import_repo
tools.description: Import a GitHub repo into the local database
